title: A2CN DisputeResolvedMessage
description: Resolution of a dispute opened by DISPUTE_NOTICE. Closes the post-commitment dispute lifecycle. Normative at Level 3 conformance as of v0.2.1 (OQ-017 resolved).

transaction_record_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the agreed transaction record

dispute_notice_message_id.description: message_id of the DISPUTE_NOTICE being resolved

resolution_outcome.description: Who prevailed in the dispute resolution

resolver_did.description: DID of the neutral resolver that issued the resolution

resolution_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when resolution was issued

resolution_notes.description: Optional explanatory notes from the resolver

evidence_references.description: Supporting evidence references for the ruling
